activities.name: Tanah Lot
activities.description: Pura di atas batu karang di tepi laut, ikonik saat sunset.

activities.name: Waterbom Bali
activities.description: Taman air terbesar di Asia dengan berbagai wahana seru.

activities.name: Tegalalang Rice Terrace
activities.description: Sawah berteras yang indah, cocok untuk foto dan trekking.

activities.name: Warung Babi Guling Ibu Oka
activities.description: Warung babi guling legendaris yang terkenal di Ubud.

activities.name: Jimbaran Seafood
activities.description: Makan malam seafood segar di tepi pantai Jimbaran.

activities.name: Masjid Agung Bali
activities.description: Masjid terbesar di Bali, cocok untuk salat dan wisata religi.

activities.name: Pantai Kuta
activities.description: Pantai ikonik Bali yang terkenal dengan ombak dan sunset-nya.

activities.name: Monkey Forest Ubud
activities.description: Hutan sakral dengan ratusan monyet ekor panjang dan pura kuno.

activities.name: Candi Borobudur
activities.description: Candi Buddha terbesar di dunia, Warisan Dunia UNESCO.

activities.name: Candi Prambanan
activities.description: Kompleks candi Hindu terbesar di Indonesia.

activities.name: Malioboro Street Food
activities.description: Jajanan kaki lima khas Jogja sepanjang Jalan Malioboro.

activities.name: Masjid Gedhe Kauman Yogyakarta
activities.description: Masjid Agung Kesultanan Yogyakarta, bersejarah dan dekat Kraton.

activities.name: Gili Trawangan Snorkeling
activities.description: Snorkeling di perairan jernih Gili Trawangan, full equipment tersedia.

activities.name: Masjid Islamic Center Lombok
activities.description: Masjid ikonik Lombok dengan kubah besar, pemandangan indah.
